missionDesc: Build and ship Matrix — a self-hosted productivity platform — to CubePath VPS for the CubePath Hackathon 2026. Mission: from zero to production in under 30 days.
obj1Desc: Secure Express API with per-user SQLite and session auth.
obj2Desc: React SPA: tasks, ideas, passwords, settings.
obj3Desc: Deploy to CubePath VPS via Dokploy 1-Click App. Traefik handles auto HTTPS. Compete in CubePath Hackathon 2026.
obj4Desc: Responsive design for mobile browsers + PWA install prompt with offline caching.
plan1Desc: Per-user SQLite schema with Drizzle ORM.
plan2Desc: scrypt + HMAC tokens, rate limiting, timing-safe comparisons.
plan3Desc: Kanban with priorities, deadlines and calendar picker.
plan4Desc: Capture ideas with evaluation scores and funnel view.
plan5Desc: Multi-stage Dockerfile + Dokploy 1-Click App on CubePath VPS.
plan6Desc: GitHub Actions typecheck + Dokploy auto-deploy on push to main.
plan7Desc: Mobile-first layout: sidebar overlay, stacked kanban, adaptive modals.
plan8Desc: Service worker, web manifest, install prompt and offline caching via Workbox.
t7d: Always run hash for unknown users
t9: Priority dots with cycle on click
t13: Dev Feed widget — Hacker News + GitHub trending via free APIs
t14: Daily Thought widget — ZenQuotes API with local fallback
t15: Idea capture form with target linking
t19: Set up Dokploy on CubePath VPS via 1-Click App
t21: Add DATA_DIR volume for persistent SQLite
t23: Configure Dokploy auto-deploy on push to main
t23d: No SSH keys needed — Dokploy pulls from GitHub
t24: Configure SECURE_COOKIE and SESSION_SECRET in Dokploy
t25: Add trust proxy for Traefik reverse proxy
t26: Sidebar overlay with hamburger button on mobile
t26d: Fixed overlay + backdrop click to close
t28: Inline task status selector for mobile
t29: Adapt modals and views for small screens
t31: Web manifest with icons and theme color
t32: Offline caching strategy for static assets
t33: Install prompt banner in app header
proj1Desc: Full-stack productivity platform. Submitted to CubePath Hackathon 2026. Live at matrix.stackbp.es.
proj2Desc: Original Electron desktop version — migrated to web for CubePath deployment.
idea1d: Use Claude API to suggest next actions based on current objectives and activity.
idea2d: Allow tasks to repeat daily/weekly/monthly with auto-reset.
idea3d: Mobile users judging the hackathon — PWA makes first impression count. Service worker + manifest for offline-capable experience.
idea4d: Multiple users sharing a mission — invite via link.
idea5d: Full export of all user data for backup or migration. Backend GET /api/export endpoint + download button in Settings.
idea6d: Start/stop timer per task. Track time spent per plan and objective. Show totals in the dashboard.
idea7d: Audio feedback on task completion, pomodoro end, and deadline alerts. Opt-in toggle in Settings.
idea8d: Select multiple tasks to move status, change priority, or delete in one action.
idea9d: Daily contribution grid in Overview built from activity_log. Visual streak and productivity pattern.
idea10d: Switch theme automatically based on time of day (e.g. light 8am–8pm). Configured in Settings.
idea11d: Visible countdown tied to the current in-progress task.
idea12d: Monthly calendar showing all task and plan deadlines.
idea13: Migrate from Electron to web app
idea13d: Drop Electron, run as pure Node.js web app. Enables multi-user and cloud deployment on CubePath VPS.
idea14: Deploy demo user with seed data
idea14d: Pre-populate demo account so hackathon judges can explore all features without registering.
eval1: Strong alignment with mission. High impact, manageable cost. Schedule post-MVP.
eval2: Adds schema complexity. Good feature for v1.1.
eval3: Hackathon judges will test on mobile. High visibility, already implemented.
eval4: Multi-tenancy complexity too high for hackathon scope.
eval5: Already in RightPanel. High alignment, quick win.
eval7: Essential for CubePath deployment and hackathon. Removes native dependency completely.
eval8: Critical for hackathon judging experience. Low risk, already implemented.
actMission: Created mission: Launch Matrix to Production

actTask4: Completed task: Implement scrypt password hashing

actTask6: Completed task: Rate limiting on auth routes
actIdea1: Created idea: Add AI-powered task suggestions
actIdea6: Created idea: Pomodoro timer in RightPanel
actTask9: Completed task: Priority dots with cycle on click
actTask17: Completed task: Set up Dokploy on CubePath VPS
actTask18: Completed task: Configure Traefik + auto HTTPS
actTask19: Completed task: DATA_DIR volume for persistent SQLite
actTask20: Completed task: CI workflow — typecheck on PR
actTask21: Completed task: Dokploy auto-deploy on push to main
actTask24: Completed task: Sidebar overlay on mobile
actIdea5: Created idea: Export data as JSON/CSV
actTask29: Completed task: Web manifest with icons
